name: node-rimraf
title: node-rimraf
summary: Deep deletion (like rm -rf) module for Node.js
description:
Deep deletion (like rm -rf) module for Node.js
node-rimraf is a Node.js module that provides asynchronous deep-deletion
of files and directories.
.
The `rimraf` executable is a faster alternative to the `rm -rf` shell
command.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use rimraf because Deep deletion (like rm -rf) module for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use rimraf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `rimraf <path>` as documented upstream for rimraf.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair rimraf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `rimraf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
